name: Old Mutual Limited
sub_sector: Life Insurance / Financial holding (life & savings, asset management, P&C insurance, banking)

annual_reports.notes: Group Annual Results booklet (Dec year-end), published mid-March.

interim_reports.notes: Interim results (6 months to 30 June), published ~mid-September

investor_presentations.notes: Results presentation + Capital Markets Day (Q4 2025) deck

notes: Dec year-end. FY2025 results released 17 Mar 2026 (audited, unmodified). Medium-term targets set at Capital Markets Day Oct 2025: RoNAV 15-17pct, RoGEV 14-16pct, VNB margin 2-3pct, OM Insure net underwriting margin 5-8pct, DPS growth 6-9pct (3-yr rolling). R3bn buyback (R0.7bn done). R2.5bn cost-savings programme. OM Bank targeting profitability FY2028.

old-mutual-annual-results-fy2025-2026031.analysis_summary: FY2026/27 scenario & outlook note (deep). FY2025 anchor: RFO +13% to R9,821m, AHE +24% to R8,263m (both Malawi/market-flattered; ~7-9%/11-16% ex-Malawi), VNB -52% to R850m, VNB margin 1.2% (below 2-3% target), RoNAV 15.2% (low end of 15-17%; 14.0-14.5% ex-Malawi), RoGEV 4.1%, DPS +8%, solvency 162%, NCCF -R10.4bn (narrowed 55%). Unmodified joint audit. Net management tone cautiously confident/execution-focused; implies value-KPI upgrade over the reset window but no near-term EPS upgrade. Bull/Neutral/Bear FY2026 projections (e) for RFO, AHE/share, RoNAV, VNB margin, OM Bank loss, DPS. Peer verdict vs Sanlam/Discovery/Momentum/SBG-Liberty: HOLD (Neutral), GAIN (Bull), LOSE (Bear). Risk flags: earnings quality (Malawi/markets), persistency-basis change, solvency drift, NCCF still negative, OM Bank losses to FY2028. Sector lens: jse-sector-insurance. Deliverable: companies/old-mutual/analyst-notes/Old_Mutual_FY2026-27_Scenario_Outlook_Note.docx.
old-mutual-annual-results-fy2025-2026031._provenance: Group Annual Results for the year ended 31 December 2025.
